---
name: Change Request
about: Request a change to be merged into the Master version
title: '[CHANGE-REQUEST] Solution: ___ | Type: fix/feat/breaking'
labels: change-request
assignees: sachin-dehran
---

## Change Request

**Solution:** <!-- e.g. dbops_versol1 -->
**Your Team / Branch:** <!-- e.g. project-team2 -->
**Change Type:** <!-- patch (fix) / minor (feat) / major (breaking) -->

### What change is needed?
<!-- Describe the change clearly -->

### Why is this needed?
<!-- What problem does it solve? -->

### Which teams would benefit?
<!-- Is this only your team or could others use it too? -->

### Have you tested it in your branch?
- [ ] Yes — working in `project-{team}` branch
- [ ] Not yet

### PR Checklist (when you open the PR to main)
- [ ] PR title starts with `fix:` / `feat:` / `breaking:`
- [ ] PR has label `patch` / `minor` / `major`
- [ ] Both prefix and label agree (required by Workflow 2)
